overall.description: Atmospheric horror game footage depicting first-person exploration of a foggy, abandoned urban alley at night. The scene transitions from red-lit emergency lighting through a security checkpoint into dark foggy streets, ending in a green-lit underpass approaching a building with illuminated windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned alley with scaffolding and graffiti-covered walls

events.description: camera turns right to examine graffiti on the wall before turning back forward

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the foggy red-lit alley, examining the graffiti-covered walls and abandoned vehicle

entered.detail: tall metal scaffolding structure lining the left side of the alley
derelict car parked on the left side of the alley
brick wall covered in white and red graffiti tags
scattered trash and rubble covering the asphalt ground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow foggy alley bathed in red emergency lighting. Metal scaffolding lines the left side while an abandoned sedan sits parked ahead. The camera moves forward, briefly turning to examine graffiti on the right wall before continuing down the debris-strewn path.

scene_state.functional_zone: security checkpoint with metal gate and traffic cones

events.description: passing through the metal security gate with red warning lights into the area beyond

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing through a security checkpoint with red-lit barriers

entered.detail: metal gate structure with horizontal bars and red warning lights
orange and white striped cones blocking parts of the path

segments.scene_description: Moving through the alley toward a security checkpoint, the camera approaches a metal gate with red warning lights. Traffic cones line the path as the camera passes through the barrier, leaving the initial scaffolding and car behind while entering a darker section of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark foggy street beyond the security checkpoint

events.description: entering an area with greenish-yellow lighting under concrete structures

agents.ego_description: walking through the dark foggy street toward distant lights and an underpass

entered.detail: tall street lamp with dim lighting on the left side
faint white lights visible through the fog in the distance
dark building wall visible on the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: Beyond the checkpoint, the street opens into a darker, foggy area with very low visibility. Street lamps and distant headlights pierce the darkness as the camera moves forward, approaching a transition to a green-lit underpass area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with support pillars approaching a building with illuminated windows

events.description: approaching a brick building with illuminated yellow windows behind a chain-link fence

agents.ego_description: moving through the green-lit underpass toward a building with glowing windows

entered.detail: large striped concrete pillars supporting the overhead structure
street lamp emitting greenish light in the fog
metal garbage bin on the sidewalk
tall brick building wall with weathered texture
windows glowing with yellow light behind metal bars
metal fence with diamond pattern in front of the building

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to a covered walkway with concrete pillars bathed in green foggy light. The camera moves forward past a trash can, approaching a brick building with illuminated yellow windows visible behind a chain-link fence, creating a focal point in the darkness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic, red-lit alleyway that gradually opens into a dark, fog-shrouded urban underpass. It begins by gliding past metal scaffolding and an abandoned sedan under the glow of red emergency lights, briefly panning toward graffiti on a side wall. As the camera advances, it passes through a security checkpoint marked by a metal gate and warning lights, leaving the debris-strewn path behind to enter a darker, more expansive street. The scene then shifts into a zone of low visibility where distant headlights pierce the fog, before the lighting transitions from red to a sickly green within a covered walkway of concrete pillars. Finally, the camera moves past a trash can toward a chain-link fence, focusing on a brick building with illuminated yellow windows that glow against the surrounding darkness.
